news.title: Iran won't accept U.S. effort at ceasefire in war, state media reports
news.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump has claimed the United States and Iran are "in negotiations now" But the Islamic Republic denies any direct talks to end the war.

news.title: Recession odds climb on Wall Street as economy shows cracks beneath the surface
news.summary: Economists have pulled up their risk assessments of a contraction amid heightened uncertainty over geopolitical risk and a labor market slump. The U.S. economy is expected to contract for the first time in more than two years.

news.title: Hugo Barra's return to Meta 5 years after exit underscores Zuckerberg's AI urgency
news.summary: During Hugo Barra's first stint at Meta, the company was pushing heavily into VR. Now, he's back and the focus is AI agents.

news.title: Mortgage demand drops more than 10% as rates hit the highest level since October
news.summary: Mortgage demand continued to tumble last week, as mortgage rates surged higher and affordability weakened further. Mortgage demand continues to tumble as rates surge and affordability weakens further.

news.title: Arm jumps 15% as company expects revenue windfall from new chip, a 'significant shift'
news.summary: Arm said it expects its new chip to generate six times more revenue in 2031 than the $4 billion it made in 2025. Arm said it expected to make $6 billion in revenue by 2031, up from $3.5 billion in 2025, and $2 billion in 2020.

news.title: Intel’s stock is climbing. Here’s why the company’s new chip launch is so significant.
news.summary: The launch of enterprise-focused processors shows that it’s ready to ship high volumes of products made with its new chip technology, an analyst said.

news.title: SpaceX could soon file for an IPO. Why EchoStar and other space stocks are rising.
news.summary: Elon Musk’s company could raise more than $75 billion, according to The Information. That would easily make for one of the biggest IPOs in history.

news.title: Elizabeth Warren raises concerns over MrBeast’s teen banking app — and its connection to a troubled bank
news.summary: Sen. Elizabeth Warren is raising concerns about a popular YouTuber’s venture into financial services with his acquisition of a banking app. Step and its connection to Evolve Bank & Trust.

news.title: Leading home builder says the Iran war is already hurting housing market
news.summary: KB Home shares were under pressure on Wednesday after saying it’s already seeing prospective buyers deterred by the war. The Los Angeles home builder cut its full-year guidance.

news.title: Iran war volatility is pushing retail investors to sell stocks, but they aren’t leaving the market entirely
news.summary: Retail investors are gaining exposure to the market beyond single stocks. Retail investors are gain exposure to markets beyond just single stocks, analysts say.
